title: Tea with a Raptor
logline: A genetically engineered Velociraptor escapes a shady biotech lab and hides in the back room of a failing artisanal tea shop in Portland, where its incredible sense of smell creates the most incredible tea blends the city has ever tasted.
tone: heartwarming, whimsical, comedic, Amélie meets Paddington

characters.name: Rexi
characters.description: A 7-foot-tall genetically engineered Velociraptor with iridescent feathered plumage in deep greens and copper tones, large amber eyes with slit pupils, long expressive tail, three-fingered hands with delicate dexterity, beak-like snout. Not scary - elegant, curious, gentle, with an air of refined sophistication. Moves with surprising grace and quiet elegance.
characters.wardrobe: natural feathered plumage - iridescent green and copper tones

profile.physical_signature: Tall feathered raptor silhouette, copper-green iridescent plumage, elegant long tail, amber slit-pupil eyes, delicate three-fingered hands, refined non-horror presence.
profile.face: Beak-like snout with expressive brow ridges, intelligent gentle gaze, no monstrous snarling unless a shot explicitly asks for comedy.
profile.eyes: Large amber eyes with vertical slit pupils, curious and emotionally readable.
profile.body: Seven feet tall, lean athletic dinosaur build, graceful neck, feathered limbs, long balancing tail.
profile.movement: Quiet, precise, balletic movements; handles objects carefully like a trained tea sommelier.
profile.personality: Gentle, curious, elegant, polite, quietly delighted by rare tea leaves.
profile.voice: Soft rumbling purrs, delicate chirps, refined nonverbal reactions; never horror roars.
profile.consistency_notes: Always charming and lovable, never frightening. Keep the same feather colors, amber eyes, body scale, and graceful demeanor across every shot.
profile.negative_prompt: scary monster design, horror raptor, blood, gore, aggressive snarling, reptile-only skin with no feathers

characters.name: Maya Chen
characters.description: Sarcastic, burnt-out widow in her early 40s, tired eyes but warm heart underneath. Wears practical clothes - dark jeans, worn sweater, apron stained with tea. Originally cynical but slowly thaws. Hasn't truly smiled since her husband passed.
characters.wardrobe: dark jeans, worn cream sweater, tea-stained apron, messy bun

profile.physical_signature: Early-40s Chinese American woman with tired expressive eyes, practical posture, guarded warmth, and a lived-in tea shop owner look.
profile.face: Oval face, subtle under-eye shadows, natural skin texture, restrained expressions that soften into genuine warmth over the story.
profile.hair: Dark hair in a loose messy bun with a few escaped strands around her face.
profile.eyes: Dark brown tired eyes, observant and dryly skeptical, warmer when she connects with Rexi.
profile.body: Average height and build, slightly slouched from exhaustion early on, more open and relaxed after the shop transforms.
profile.movement: Efficient practical movements, wiping counters and serving tea with muscle memory; later lighter and more playful.
profile.personality: Sarcastic, grief-worn, cynical on the surface, compassionate underneath.
profile.voice: Dry, low-key humor with clipped practical phrasing; emotional moments are quiet rather than melodramatic.
profile.consistency_notes: Keep her age, ethnicity, messy bun, cream sweater, tea-stained apron, tired eyes, and gradual emotional thaw consistent.
profile.negative_prompt: teenager, glamorous fashion model, perfect makeup, different ethnicity, bright new clothing, exaggerated melodrama

locations.name: Willow & Leaf Tea Co.
locations.description: Failing artisanal tea shop in Portland - worn wooden floors, dusty teapots on shelves, a few mismatched tables, large front window with afternoon light. Cozy but neglected. Smells of old tea leaves and melancholy.

locations.name: Tea Shop Back Room
locations.description: Small cluttered storage room behind the shop where Rexi hides. Boxes of tea supplies, aged oolongs, jasmine, rare leaves. Dim lighting, warm and safe.

locations.name: Portland Street
locations.description: Rain-dampened Portland street outside the tea shop, hipster cafes, coffee shops, gentle grey skies

do: shallow depth of field on characters

reference_notes: This is a HEARTWARMING comedy - NOT scary. The raptor should be charming, elegant, and lovable - like a Michelin-star sommelier who's also a 7-foot tall murder chicken. Think Amélie's whimsy + Paddington's sweetness. No horror elements whatsoever.
